summary.intent: Create and implement story 5.1 for a metrics project: a Node.js fetch script that pulls checkpoint metadata from GitHub API and writes a local JSON cache used at build time.
summary.outcome: Story 5.1 fully implemented with scripts/fetch-checkpoints.ts, TypeScript types, 17 new unit tests (121 total passing), build guard in astro.config.mjs, and all sprint tracking updated to 'review' status.

repo: Project uses BMAD methodology with structured planning artifacts in _bmad-output/ and skill workflows under .claude/skills/
Cache file src/data/checkpoints-cache.json is gitignored; src/data/ is tracked via .gitkeep
vitest.config.ts needed explicit include for scripts/**/*.test.ts — it did not auto-discover outside src/
Lint errors in src/ are pre-existing on main branch, not introduced by this story

code.finding: In Astro 6.x, astro:config:done hook does NOT receive the 'command' parameter — must use astro:config:setup hook instead to detect build vs dev and fire the cache guard
fetchWithRetry accepts an optional delayFn parameter to make retry delay injectable — avoids fake timer / unhandled rejection warnings in vitest while keeping real 2s delay in production

mockRejectedValueOnce creates rejected promises eagerly, causing unhandled rejection warnings before catch handlers attach — use mockImplementationOnce returning a rejected promise lazily, or inject a no-op delay to avoid fake timers entirely

workflow: BMAD workflow: /bmad-create-story first, then /bmad-dev-story to implement, then /bmad-code-review (ideally different LLM)
Sprint status YAML is updated at story creation (ready-for-dev), at dev start (in-progress), and at completion (review)
Build guard verification requires actually running the build command — checking hook existence is insufficient; must confirm the error message surfaces correctly

friction: Initial test run failed with exit code 1 due to unhandled rejection warnings from mockRejectedValueOnce — required two refactor passes to resolve cleanly
astro:config:done hook silently does not pass 'command' in Astro 6.x — build guard appeared to work but did not fire until hook was switched to astro:config:setup
open_items: Run /bmad-code-review on story 5.1 (recommended with a different LLM)
Run npm run fetch-checkpoints to populate src/data/checkpoints-cache.json before story 5-2 can be developed
Story 5-2 (dashboard page with all 20 charts) not yet created or implemented
Pre-existing lint errors in src/ not addressed — deferred as out of scope for this story
